mxCell.value: HL-MCK Antidetect Browser — Iterative & Incremental Development Model
14 weeks · 5 members · 386 estimated person-days · 4 phases · 3 Construction Iterations
• Vision & SRS v0.9-v1.0 • Architecture (SDS v0.9) • UI mockup hi-fi • Tech-stack lock-in

Goal: Auth + License + Profile core + Renderer base
Deliverable: • Software Package V1 • SDS v1.0 · SRS v1.1 • Unit + Integration tests

Goal: + Proxy + Cookie + Profile UI overhaul
Deliverable: • Software Package V2 • SDS v1.2 · SRS v1.2 • Unit + Integration tests

Goal: + Fingerprint + Engine + Automation + REST API + Web Admin
Deliverable: • Software Package V3 (feature-complete) • SDS v1.3 • Unit + Integration + first System Test
• System Test Report (5.3) • Test Documentation (5.0) • Acceptance Test • Final Software Package • Report 6 — User Guide
• Report 7 (Final) • Presentation File • Capstone Defense • Repo tag v1.0.0
Each Iteration follows the same internal cycle:
⑤ Integration Test (+ regression on V_n-1)
Incremental delivery: each iteration ships a runnable, working Software Package
Auth + License + Profile core + Renderer base
V1 + Proxy + Cookie + Profile UI overhaul
Software Package V3 (end of W11) — feature-complete
V2 + Fingerprint + Engine + Automation + REST API + Web Admin
REST API Server Fastify 5 + Express 5 + Swagger UI (port 8080, JWT auth)
profiles · proxies · scripts · script_modules · tasks · task_logs · settings · licenses · audit_log
electron-store (key-value config) data/storage-state/<id>.json (Playwright cookies/localStorage) data/cdp-user-data/<id>/ (Chrome user-data)
License verify (tweetnacl Ed25519 + machine-ID binding) · javascript-obfuscator (release)
Pages: Landing · Pricing · Sign-up · Login · EULA · Download · Admin Users · App Version · Maintenance
Auth controller · admin.controller · license.controller (issue / revoke / verify)
Firebase Auth + Firestore (users / licenses / app version)
External REST API client (Postman, scripts, integrations)
HL-MCK Antidetect Browser — Use Case Diagram
FE-01: Manage Browser Profiles (Create / Edit / Delete / Clone / List)
FE-03: Manage Proxies (CRUD / Bulk Import / Health-check / Rotate)
FE-04: Automate Browser Tasks (Scripts via Playwright + scheduler)
FE-05: Launch Profile via Browser Engine (Playwright / Camoufox)
FE-06: Local Data & Privacy (SQLite + storage state per profile)
Bulk Run Script on Multiple Profiles
Control Profiles via REST API (Swagger UI · 29 endpoints)
HL-MCK — Local Database Schema (SQLite via better-sqlite3 + drizzle-orm)
